titleStmt.title: SII 27.427: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 427. (A.R. No. 560 of 1929-30.) HATTIYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in prākāra of the Lokanāthēśvara temple.

This record is dated the cyclic year Bahudhānya, Bhādrapada Kārttika, Saṅkarānti. As it is engraved on the same stone as No. 426 above and is in characters of the 16th century the year may be equated to 1578-79 A.D., and the details of date to 1578 A.D., November 29, which was the day of Saṅkrānti in Karthika.
It registers gift of land free from taxes to god Lōkanātha of the Haṭṭiyaṅgaḍi by Saṁkami, daughter of Bāurāutta who purchased the land and presented it to his daughter for that purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti bahudhānya saṁvatsarada kruttike saṁkṛti modalāgi śrīmatu haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvara bhaṁ
ḍārake bāurāuttara magaḷu saṁkami koṭṭa dharmasādanada patrada vokhaṇekrama veṁteṁdare sābaladi
ya voḷage bāurāuttaru bōḷikēriya Ayivaru halaruvaru dakṣenaḍuva bhattaḷi Avarakayali
bāurāuttaru malavakoṁḍu tāu bādu nanage koṭu nānu bādu baṁda kuduregaḍeya gaḍiya vivara
mūḍalu tirumeṭṭijaḍina gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu hoḷeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu hoḷe salamaḍida vonakeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu baḍagalu sālagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁttī nāku catusīmeya vaḷagaṇa sadraśa bittaṇakkemuḍi 16 gade yigaḍiya voḷagaṇa biṭṭu teṭṭu A
sabhasa sabhamaṁdu marapala hoḷekaḷu saha sābādu bidastaḷada meḷa haṭṭi Aṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadē
vara Ayana mūrudinada raṁgapūjege nāgaṁḍugadalu muḍi 4 . Akkiyanu kālakālaṁ pratiya pratiyalū na
ḍasi baha neṁdu koṭṭa dharma sadhanada patrayastaḷada Āguhōgu dēvara dēyastaḷake terubēḍige yila
yi patrake Āga Arike hoṇagaṇappa seṭṭimaga bayaraṇa seṭi saṣi doregaḷu yisaraseṭi magatiṁ
maya seṭi muguvina nāraṇaseṭṭi maga tirumaṇa seṭṭi ka taravopu hoṇigarana vopu talaura bra
maru doṟigaḷa vopu yiṁtiyavara Ubhaya vuttudiṁda hoḍe madhestara barahā .
Digital edition of SII 27.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
